TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tatangahan:(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) == Kuan Yuan u pasimalan tu kazizeng u tulakang niza pakaala tu 2374 depah, malingatu tu pacakay tu "Yunduan pacang" kakaliman:(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) zungyuw a pasimalan tu kazizeng u tulakang niza pakaala tu 2374 depah misakapah tu limaay a bulad, ayza a demiad malingatu tu mipacakay tu simal, singangan i Taywan walu zazan, cacay a bulad kunipacakay pkala tu lima malebut kunupacakay tu pacang, == nilaculan: ==
S.PHON: == tataŇčańßan:(mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~…ĺumjiti sakatiz…ôŇč baŇču) == kuan juan u pasimar~…ĺan tu kaziz…ôŇč u tur~…ĺakaŇč niza pakaar~…ĺa tu **** d…ôpańß, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu pa ¶akaj tu "junduan pa ¶aŇč" kakar~…ĺiman:(mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~…ĺumjiti sakatiz…ôŇč baŇču) zuŇčjuw a pasimar~…ĺan tu kaziz…ôŇč u tur~…ĺakaŇč niza pakaar~…ĺa tu **** d…ôpańß misakapańß tu r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺad, ajza a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mipa ¶akaj tu simar~…ĺ, siŇčaŇčan i tajwan war~…ĺu zazan, ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad kunipa ¶akaj pkar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima mar~…ĺ…ôbut kunupa ¶akaj tu pa ¶aŇč, == nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan: ==
S.FORM: == tatangahan:(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) == Kuan Yuan u pasimalan tu kazizeng u tulakang niza pakaala tu 2374 depah, malingatu tu pacakay tu "Yunduan pacang" kakaliman:(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) zungyuw a pasimalan tu kazizeng u tulakang niza pakaala tu 2374 depah misakapah tu limaay a bulad, ayza a demiad malingatu tu mipacakay tu simal, singangan i Taywan walu zazan, cacay a bulad kunipacakay pkala tu lima malebut kunupacakay tu pacang, == nilaculan: ==
S.PHON: == tataŇčańßan:(mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~…ĺumjiti sakatiz…ôŇč baŇču) == kuan juan u pasimar~…ĺan tu kaziz…ôŇč u tur~…ĺakaŇč niza pakaar~…ĺa tu **** d…ôpańß, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu pa ¶akaj tu "junduan pa ¶aŇč" kakar~…ĺiman:(mikawawaj-kar~…ĺumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~…ĺumjiti sakatiz…ôŇč baŇču) zuŇčjuw a pasimar~…ĺan tu kaziz…ôŇč u tur~…ĺakaŇč niza pakaar~…ĺa tu **** d…ôpańß misakapańß tu r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺad, ajza a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mipa ¶akaj tu simar~…ĺ, siŇčaŇčan i tajwan war~…ĺu zazan, ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad kunipa ¶akaj pkar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima mar~…ĺ…ôbut kunupa ¶akaj tu pa ¶aŇč, == nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan: ==
